name: aelix
description: Aelix monorepo launcher — one command runs the landing (Next.js :5190) and the app/vault dashboard (Vite :5180) together.

scripts.build: npm --prefix landing run build && npm --prefix ui run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n landing,app -c green,yellow "npm --prefix landing run start" "npm --prefix ui run preview"
